title: Maja Bloom And Sudeepta Sanyal Work In Progress
description: An Indian writer and a Polish actor walk into a bar - and a SPLIT BILL is born. Maja Bloom and Sudeepta Sanyal combine forces for a Work-in-Progress: Forty, Foreign & Ferocious! There will be gossip, accents, and there just might be vodka shots. Is that a bribe? or a threat? Both! We did the math. It’s going to be a riot! Come see what the fuss is all about! Maja Bloom is a multilingual actress, singer and a stand-up comedian best known for playing Carrow in the Fantastic Beasts franchise. "She is funny, with the promise of becoming even funnier' according to Edinburgh Reviews. She charms audiences all around Europe with her frank observations of an immigrant Brit who is never 'British enough'. Sudeepta Sanyal is Runner-up at West End New Old Act 2025, Finalist at West End New Act 2026 & an alum of SOHO Theatre Comedy Labs plus 2026 and Brown Sauce X Tara Theatre 2025. Her stand up is culturally confused. Emotionally raw. Unapologetically herself.
